notes: Provider resolution for this scenario is anchored by vk_call_debug_success_v1, but the legacy oracle does not expose a committed runtime flag equivalent to rewrite bind-interface with literal local IP semantics.
This asset records rewrite behavior for the supported slice while keeping the provider-backed VK resolution precondition identical to the legacy-compatible fixtures above.

The rewrite success path is replayed deterministically by TestRuntimeEvidenceReplay using provider=vk, fixture-driven staged HTTP resolution, a UDP TURN allocation, a DTLS peer, and bind-interface=127.0.0.2.
cmd/tunnel-client/main.go returns exit code 0 when session.Run completes without error.

deviations: Rewrite supports bind-interface as a literal local IP for outbound TURN setup; the legacy oracle has no equivalent committed runtime flag for this behavior.
